name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-19
title: SKILL.md and rabbit-config.py docstring reference nonexistent shim file
description: skills/rabbit-config/SKILL.md (line 15-17) states 'The slash-command shim at .claude/features/rabbit-cage/commands/rabbit-config.md execs that script with $ARGUMENTS.' But spec Inv 25 EXPLICITLY forbids that file from existing, and tests test-rabbit-config.py t1/t3 and test-BACKLOG-11-rabbit-config-skill.py t4 verify it does not exist. skills/rabbit-config/scripts/rabbit-config.py module docstring (line 12) repeats the same false claim: 'The slash-command shim at commands/rabbit-config.md execs it.' Both must be corrected to reflect that invocation is solely through the skill mechanism (no shim file).

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
